channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Legal AI Startup Harvey In Talks To Raise $200 Million At $11 Billion Valuation

item.title: Neuro-Symbolic AI Steps Up To Produce Robust Mental Health Treatment Plans
item.description: AI can be used to produce mental health treatment plans. That's already happening. The next era is using neuro-symbolic AI. I lay out the future. An A...

item.title: AI Is Breaking Jobs Into Tasks, And That Changes Everything
item.description: AI is not automating jobs in one go; it is disassembling them into tasks, deleting repetitive work, and forcing new human responsibilities to emerge.

item.title: Process thinking

item.title: Free agency
